mapper.sql: s.id AS station_id, s.resource_unit_id, s.name AS station_name, s.capacity_mw, s.weight, s.status, s.sort_index, s.load_visible, c.biz_date, c.time_slot, c.load_kw, c.pv_power_kw, c.forecast_power_kw, c.baseline_power_kw, c.irradiance, c.temperature
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pm_station_curve_15m c JOIN pm_station s ON s.id = c.station_id WHERE s.load_visible = TRUE AND c.biz_date = #{bizDate} ORDER BY s.sort_index, c.time_slot
